Moss Bluff Storage Conditions for 1/29/2026


Notice Text:

The following restriction will be in place on the Moss Bluff Storage (Moss Bluff) system for Gas Day January 29, 2026:

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations at meter 45205 - NGPL STORAGE, TX (D40206/R40205). No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations at meter 45207 - TETCO - STORAGE, TX (D40208/R40207). No increases in withdrawals will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.




BackPrint

messages.content: You are a structured data extraction assistant. Extract information from HTML documents and return only valid JSON. Be precise and thorough.

Extract these fields from the HTML notice as JSON: - title: The main notice title/subject - noticeType: Type of notice (Maintenance, Capacity Constraint, Force Majeure, etc.) - status: Initiate, Supersede, or Cancel - postedDate: When notice was posted (ISO 8601) - effectiveDate: When notice takes effect (ISO 8601) - endDate: When notice expires (ISO 8601, null if none) - description: Main content/body of the notice (cleaned text, not HTML) - affectedLocations: List of affected locations/meters if mentioned - responseRequired: true if response is required, false otherwise Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown or explanation.
